title: Spaghetti Carbonara
instructions: Cook spaghetti. Fry pancetta. Mix eggs and parmesan. Combine all and season with pepper.

title: Pasta Bolognese
instructions: Cook pasta. Prepare sauce with beef and vegetables. Combine and serve.

title: Pesto Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta. Blend basil, pine nuts, parmesan, and olive oil to make pesto. Mix with pasta.
